user.title: Connect to Kismet
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Kismet server.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the Kismet server.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Kismet server.

abort.already_configured: This Kismet server is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the Kismet server (10-300 seconds).
data_description.active_window: Devices seen within this window are considered active (60-3600 seconds).
data_description.tracked_macs: MAC addresses to track for presence detection (e.g., AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF, 11:22:33:44:55:66).
data_description.enable_device_tracker: Create device tracker entities for tracked MACs.
